'''Doli''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] rumored by [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] to be the location of a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]].

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: The Followers]]'' {{1stm}}
